description: Pre-Session B classification for love (reg 103). Sets anchor verse (1Jo 4:8). Confirms delete of G0080 adelfos (bleed). Extracts and classifies all 102 None-status terms across extract, extract_thin, xref, and delete categories.

operations.description: Set anchor verse for love registry. 1Jo 4:8 — 'Anyone who does not love does not know God, because God is love.' This is the most theologically radical statement in the love vocabulary and the entire corpus: love is not merely an attribute of God but a predicate of his being (theos agapē estin). It establishes the ontological ground within which every other love statement in the corpus must be read. The fear registry's anchor (1Jo 4:18) is in the same passage — anchoring both sides of the love-fear opposition which is the top Session D priority (PH2-103-003 and PH2-061-001).

G0080 adelfos [brother] — confirm delete. del_flag=1 already set. 340 occurrences, 310 verses, but adelfos is kinship/community vocabulary not love vocabulary. It entered via the philadelphia/filadelfia (brotherly love) relatedNos. Primary analysis is in the fellowship/community registry. The brotherhood love concept is adequately covered by G5360 filadelfia (extracted) and G5361 filadelfos (extracted).

set.exclusion_reason: Bleed from filadelfia/brotherly-love root. Brotherhood kinship vocabulary; primary analysis in community/fellowship registry. Love content adequately covered by G5360 filadelfia (extracted).

operations.description: H0157G a.hev [to love: lover] — xref_desire. Primary love verb (207 occ). Cross-registry link to desire (reg 43) already confirmed in CRL table. Primary analysis held in desire registry. This is the most important cross-registry relationship in the love inventory.

notes: G0080 adelfos confirmed delete — 310 verses, bleed from brotherhood vocabulary.
102 None-status terms classified: ~60 extract/extract_thin, ~35 delete, 1 xref_desire.

Key extractions: H7453 re.a (neighbor — 'love your neighbor as yourself'), H7358 re.chem (womb — anatomical root of compassion), H0157G classified xref_desire, G5384 filos (friend — 101 occ), G0018 agathos (good — 505 occ), G1515 eirēnē (peace — 307 occ).

Note: love_patch operations on None-status terms use strongs_number only (no mti_id available from this export for None-status terms). Claude Code should resolve mti_id from wa_mti table by strongs_number + owning_registry=103.
